{{Location | Name=Treasure Chamber | Guid=3035-8106 | Deck=The ancient relics of the Ying dynasty have been hidden in the icy mountains for centuries, but have recently been rediscovered. | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Ying_Fortress | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3502042-1494463456-F579DsOaIAAYn6m.jpg}}

{{Location | Name=U.S. Route 101 | Guid=3035-8082 | Deck=More commonly known as the 101 Freeway, U.S. Route 101 is a highway system that spans almost the entire West Coast of the USA, from Southern California to Northern Washington. | Characters=Characters/Ant_Man,Characters/Astro_Bot,Characters/Black_Widow,Characters/Magneto,Characters/Nick_Kang,Characters/Peter_Parker,Characters/Scott_Lang,Characters/Steve_Rogers,Characters/Storm,Characters/Taskmaster,Characters/The_Hulk,Characters/Thor_4899,Characters/Tony_Stark,Characters/Wolverine | Concepts=Concepts/Chase,Concepts/Fast_Travel | Objects=Objects/Burrito,Objects/Car,Objects/Concrete_Mixer,Objects/Cup,Objects/Enchirito,Objects/FBI_Car,Objects/Glass,Objects/Grilled_Cheese,Objects/Gun,Objects/Hamburger,Objects/Muscle_Car,Objects/Police_Car,Objects/Quesadilla,Objects/Race_Car,Objects/Sports_Car,Objects/Street_Light,Objects/Taco,Objects/Tire,Objects/Tire_Iron,Objects/Tire_Spikes,Objects/Traffic_Cone,Objects/Water | Locations=Locations/California,Locations/Earth,Locations/Eureka,Locations/Golden_Gate_Bridge,Locations/Interstate_405,Locations/Interstate_Highway_System,Locations/Los_Angeles,Locations/North_America,Locations/Oregon,Locations/Oxnard,Locations/San_Francisco,Locations/Santa_Barbara,Locations/Street,Locations/Subway_3715,Locations/The_Milky_Way_Galaxy,Locations/The_United_States_of_America,Locations/Thousand_Oaks,Locations/Ventura_County,Locations/Washington,Locations/Wendys | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3487995-us_101.png}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3487995-us_101.png","path":"8\/82962\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_small,square_medium,scale_medium,scale_super,scale_small,square_avatar,square_mini,square_tiny,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> More commonly known as the 101 Freeway, U.S. Route 101 is a highway system that spans almost the entire West Coast of the USA, from Southern California to Northern Washington.

revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Location | Name=U.S. Route 97 | Guid=3035-8366 | Deck=U.S. Route 97 is a highway that spans from California all the way to Washington, even connecting to the Canadian 97. | Characters=Characters/Deacon_St_John | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations=Locations/California,Locations/Earth,Locations/Klamath,Locations/Klamath_County,Locations/North_America,Locations/Oregon,Locations/The_Milky_Way_Galaxy,Locations/The_United_States_of_America,Locations/Washington | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3732391-us_97_%281961_cutout%29.svg.png}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3732391-us_97_(1961_cutout).svg.png","path":"8\/82962\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_small,scale_medium,scale_super,scale_small,square_avatar,square_medium,square_tiny,square_mini,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> U.S. Route 97 is a highway that spans from California all the way to Washington, even connecting to the Canadian 97.

{{Location | Name=Urbana-Champaign | Guid=3035-8216 | Deck=A metropolitan area in east-central Illinois and the home of the University of Illinois. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Illinois_Fighting_Illini | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Illinois,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3614344-9819200249-heade.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3614344-9819200249-heade.jpg","path":"0\/1992\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_super,square_small,square_medium,square_avatar,scale_medium,scale_small,square_mini,square_tiny,scale_avatar,screen_medium,scale_large,screen_kubrick","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> A metropolitan area in east-central Illinois and the home of the University of Illinois.

{{Location | Name=Urdak | Guid=3035-7939 | Deck=Urdak is the realm of the Maykr race and domain of the Khan Maykr. A hub of transcendent technology, the whole city is powered by a purified form of Argent Energy. According to legends, Urdak is considered to be a living being made of the souls of past Maykrs. | Characters=Characters/Doomguy,Characters/Khan_Maykr,Characters/Samuel_Hayden,Characters/Vega_33662 | Concepts=Concepts/Female_Antagonists | Objects= | Locations= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/52/520822/3439403-1686455059-Urdak.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3439403-1686455059-Urdak.jpg","path":"52\/520822\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,scale_small,square_avatar,square_medium,scale_super,scale_medium,square_tiny,square_mini,scale_avatar,screen_kubrick,scale_large,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Urdak is the realm of the Maykr race and domain of the Khan Maykr. A hub of transcendent technology, the whole city is powered by a purified form of Argent Energy. According to legends, Urdak is considered to be a living being made of the souls of past Maykrs.

{{Location | Name=Vale Sangora | Guid=3035-8341 | Deck=The setting of The Blood of Dawnwalker, located in the Carpathian Mountains and inspired by 14th Century Polish, Romanian, Ukranian and Balkan buildings, locations and cultures. | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/33/338034/3684226-5537824558-Ghvh2EmXcAE9sa3.jpg}}

<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> Vanuatu is an island republic in the South Pacific Ocean. Its capital city is Port Vila.

revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Location | Name=Ventura County | Guid=3035-8072 | Deck=Ventura County is a county located in Southern California that borders both Los Angeles and Santa Barbara counties. | Characters=Characters/Anderson_Paak,Characters/Caitlyn_Jenner,Characters/Dave_Grohl,Characters/Johnny_Cash,Characters/Justin_Bieber,Characters/Kendall_Jenner,Characters/Kim_Kardashian,Characters/Kylie_Jenner,Characters/Murray_Bauman,Characters/Ronald_Reagan,Characters/Tiger_Woods,Characters/Tony_Ferguson | Concepts=Concepts/Basset_Hound,Concepts/Buddhism,Concepts/City_Building,Concepts/Dolphin,Concepts/Gangs,Concepts/German_Shepherd,Concepts/Golf,Concepts/Los_Angeles_Rams,Concepts/Presidential_Candidate | Objects=Objects/Avocado,Objects/Baguette,Objects/Bulgogi,Objects/Burrito,Objects/Cappuccino,Objects/Car,Objects/Chalupa,Objects/Cinnamon_Twists,Objects/Cup,Objects/Espresso,Objects/Fried_Rice,Objects/Game_Controller,Objects/Glass,Objects/Golf_Ball,Objects/Golf_Cart,Objects/Golf_Club,Objects/Golf_Tee,Objects/Gordita,Objects/Grass,Objects/Hamburger,Objects/Ice_Cream,Objects/Kimchi,Objects/Milk,Objects/Milkshake,Objects/Oak_Tree,Objects/Palm_Tree,Objects/Pizza,Objects/Quesadilla,Objects/Red_Bull,Objects/Scone,Objects/Soda_Fountain,Objects/Surfboard,Objects/Taco,Objects/Tortilla_Chips,Objects/Tree,Objects/Tree_Stump,Objects/Water,Objects/Yarmulke | Locations=Locations/7_Eleven,Locations/Adidas,Locations/Amusement_Park,Locations/Beach,Locations/Blaine_County,Locations/Burger_King,Locations/California,Locations/Cannabis_Dispensary,Locations/Cemetery,Locations/Channel_Islands,Locations/Church,Locations/City,Locations/Clothing_Store,Locations/College,Locations/Convenience_Store,Locations/Desert,Locations/Dojo,Locations/Dream,Locations/Earth,Locations/Funeral_Home,Locations/Home,Locations/Hospital,Locations/House,Locations/Lake,Locations/Los_Angeles,Locations/McDonalds,Locations/Military_Base,Locations/North_America,Locations/Oxnard,Locations/Pinks_Hot_Dogs,Locations/Pizza_Hut,Locations/Police_Station,Locations/Psychiatric_Institution,Locations/Restaurant,Locations/River,Locations/School,Locations/Sherwood_Country_Club,Locations/Storm_Drain_System,Locations/Subway_3715,Locations/Synagogue,Locations/Taco_Bell,Locations/The_Milky_Way_Galaxy,Locations/The_United_States_of_America,Locations/Thousand_Oaks,Locations/Town,Locations/U_S_Route_101,Locations/Weapon_Shop,Locations/Wendys | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3480145-seal_of_ventura_county%2C_ca.svg.png}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3480145-seal_of_ventura_county,_ca.svg.png","path":"8\/82962\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_medium,square_small,square_avatar,scale_small,scale_medium,square_mini,scale_super,square_tiny,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Ventura County is a county located in Southern California that borders both Los Angeles and Santa Barbara counties.

{{Location | Name=Vjun | Guid=3035-8092 | Deck=A planet in the Star Wars galaxy. Darth Vader had a castle here. | Characters=Characters/Count_Dooku,Characters/Darth_Vader,Characters/Jaden_Korr,Characters/Kyle_Katarn,Characters/Luke_Skywalker,Characters/Rosh_Penin,Characters/Shara_52484,Characters/Tavion_Axmis,Characters/X1,Characters/X2,Characters/Yoda | Concepts=Concepts/Disciples_of_Ragnos,Concepts/Galactic_Empire,Concepts/Hazard_Trooper,Concepts/Imperial_Officer,Concepts/Jumptrooper,Concepts/Rain,Concepts/Reborn,Concepts/Sith,Concepts/Stormtrooper,Concepts/The_Force,Concepts/TIE_Pilot | Objects=Objects/Blaster,Objects/Double_Bladed_Lightsaber,Objects/E_11_Rifle,Objects/Lightsaber,Objects/TIE_Bomber,Objects/TIE_Fighter | Locations= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/77/776653/3493236-screenshot2023-08-08171443.png}}

Darth Vader had a castle here.

{{Location | Name=Yosemite National Park | Guid=3035-8361 | Deck=Yosemite is a national park in Central California. | Characters=Characters/Aloy | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations=Locations/California,Locations/Earth,Locations/Forest,Locations/Mountains,Locations/North_America,Locations/River,Locations/The_Milky_Way_Galaxy,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3732379-yosemite-national-park-lodging-and-activities-california-united-states-showcasing-a-picturesque-natural-landscape.jpeg}}

revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Location | Name=Ypsilanti | Guid=3035-8208 | Deck=A city in Michigan and the home of East Michigan University. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Eastern_Michigan_Eagles | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Michigan,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3614332-screenshot2024-08-18at11.02.28%E2%80%AFam.png}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3614332-screenshot2024-08-18at11.02.28\u202fam.png","path":"0\/1992\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"scale_super,square_medium,square_small,scale_medium,square_tiny,scale_small,square_avatar,square_mini,scale_avatar,screen_medium,scale_large,screen_kubrick","caption":""},"background":[]}' /> A city in Michigan and the home of East Michigan University.

{{Location | Name=Zeta Halo | Guid=3035-7943 | Deck=Installation 07, also known as Zeta Halo, originally known as Gyre 11 by the Forerunners, and Oth Koronn by the Banished, is one of the seven rings in the Forerunners' Halo Array, And is the main setting of Halo Infinite. | Characters=Characters/Atriox,Characters/Cortana,Characters/Escharum,Characters/Harbinger_50174,Characters/Jega_Rdomnai,Characters/Master_Chief | Concepts=Concepts/Ambient_Wildlife,Concepts/Brutes,Concepts/Covenant_Elite,Concepts/Covenant_Grunt,Concepts/Exploration,Concepts/Hunters,Concepts/Jackals,Concepts/Open_World,Concepts/Sentinel,Concepts/The_Banished,Concepts/United_Nations_Space_Command | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Alpha_Halo,Locations/Delta_Halo,Locations/Gamma_Halo,Locations/Halo | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/52/520822/3439633-8309897588-HINF_.png}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3439633-8309897588-HINF_.png","path":"52\/520822\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"scale_medium,square_medium,square_avatar,square_small,scale_super,scale_small,square_mini,square_tiny,screen_medium,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_kubrick","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Installation 07, also known as Zeta Halo, originally known as Gyre 11 by the Forerunners, and Oth Koronn by the Banished, is one of the seven rings in the Forerunners' Halo Array, And is the main setting of Halo Infinite.

{{Location | Name=Zhejiang International Circuit | Guid=3035-8014 | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations=Locations/China }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> '''Zhejiang Circuit '''is a motorsport circuit in Shaoxing, China.

{{Object |Name=! Switch |Guid=3055-6312 |Aliases=Exclamation Switch |Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/16/164924/2833333-4430252601-Yello.png |Deck=An interactive element found throughout the Mario series, the ! Switch must be jumped on or hit to unlock paths and reveal hidden secrets in the surrounding environment. |Characters=Characters/Luigi, Characters/Mario, Characters/Wario, Characters/Yoshi |Games=Games/Mario_Party_6, Games/Mario_Pinball_Land, Games/New_Super_Mario_Bros, Games/New_Super_Mario_Bros_2, Games/New_Super_Mario_Bros_U, Games/New_Super_Mario_Bros_Wii, Games/Paper_Mario_The_Thousand_Year_Door, Games/Super_Mario_64, Games/Super_Mario_64_DS, Games/Super_Mario_All_Stars_And_Super_Mario_World, Games/Super_Mario_Bros_3_Super_Mario_Advance_4, Games/Super_Mario_World, Games/Super_Mario_World_2_Yoshis_Island, Games/Super_Mario_World_Super_Mario_Advance_2, Games/Super_Paper_Mario, Games/Wario_Land_4, Games/Yoshis_Island_DS, Games/Yoshis_Island_Super_Mario_Advance_3, Games/Yoshis_Woolly_World }} <div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"2833333-4430252601-Yello.png","path":"16\/164924\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_tiny,square_medium,scale_small,square_mini,square_avatar,square_small,scale_super,screen_medium,scale_avatar,scale_medium,scale_large,screen_kubrick","caption":null},"background":[]}' />
The ! Switch block was first introduced in the 1990 release of [[Games/Super Mario World|Super Mario World]]. Activating one could spawn items, remove walls to access coins, or solidify platforms marked by a dotted outline to traverse to new areas.

{{Object | Name=2006 Ford GT | Guid=3055-7461 | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Ford_Motor_Company,Concepts/Licensed_Cars | Franchises= | Games=Games/Asphalt_Urban_GT,Games/Project_Gotham_Racing_4,Games/Test_Drive_Unlimited_Solar_Crown | Locations= | People= | Objects=Objects/Car,Objects/Sports_Car | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/16/164924/3622182-3992138029-2006-ford-gt.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3622182-3992138029-2006-ford-gt.jpg","path":"16\/164924\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_medium,square_avatar,scale_super,square_small,scale_small,scale_medium,square_tiny,square_mini,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' />
